channel.title: how i... on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in how i... on Analyst

item.title: Once There Lived Frida
item.description: 📆 24/04/2021 , Saturday 🕰 10:21 AM. It’s an ordinary gloomy Mordor morning. To be honest, I was hoping for a sunny one… But may be one has to live somewhere else to claim that 🤷‍♀️.

item.title: How I Met Radare2
item.description: 📆 24/09/2020, Wednesday 🕰 7:00 What a nice morning! And it’s so great to be woken up by a high-pitched cry in the ear… Well, after giving my daughter her breakfast and doing all the neccessary hygine procedures for us both, I left her by my side on the development carpet, so that I could develop myself…

item.title: How I Met Fragment Injection
item.description: Friday Moscow has again become Mordor-like, the Sun is starting to make its heat more official rather than genuine because it’s getting desperately cold.

item.title: How I Met Predator
item.description: Wednesday *Ничего так, тепло.* Где-то в тёмном-тёмном лесу, среди высоких старых деревьев, притаившись в кустах выжидают свою жертву хищники.

item.title: How I Met .NET Confuser
item.description: Tuesday, Прохладно, как будто вот-вот пойдет дождь, но нет…. Приятно бывает встретиться лицом к лицу с сильным противником, потому что именно в такие моменты, после таких “битв”, становишься сильнее.

item.title: How I Met Hugo
item.description: There was a time when I was desperately trying to become a web programmer (those wonderful days of naïve curiosity🤦‍♀️).
